           left_join(position,by="ID") %>% 
           arrange(Date) %>% 
           distinct(ID,Date,.keep_all= TRUE) %>% 
           mutate(Interval=cut(Date,breaks=c(dist$Time.start[1],dist$Time.end),labels=F)) %>% 
           left_join(dist, by=Interval)
